channel.title: Mental Game Monday - My Mental Caddy™
channel.description: Your weekly mental game tip to help you think better, recover faster, and play golf with more confidence.

item.title: Mental Game Monday -
item.description:
This Week's Mental Cue

"The minute you start ‘should-ing’ yourself…you usually start shaming yourself."

Why It Matters

“I should make that.” “I shouldn’t miss that fairway.” “I should be more consistent.” Every “should” creates shame. And shame takes a LOT of energy to recover from. Then golfers wonder why the round starts feeling so heavy. Also…according to who? Your actual statistics? Or your fantasy expectations? Golf gets a lot lighter when your expectations finally meet reality.

Do This On Your Next Shot

The next time you hear a “should” thought, pause and ask: “Is this realistic…or am I just attacking myself again?

Take the Mental Game Quiz →
